message:
Fix create-version-branch workflow git identity

- Add git config for user.name and user.email before commit
- Add public/config/shared.json to git add

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -110,6 +110,10 @@ jobs:
         env:
           GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.WORKFLOW_SYNC_TOKEN }}
         run: |
+          # Configure git identity
+          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
+          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
+
           # Go back to main for the PR
           git checkout main
           git pull origin main
